title: Bolsius - True Joy - Scented Bouquet - Beige - Vanilla Delight - 80ml - Lasts up to 8 Weeks - Natural Extracts - Herbal Formula
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Take some time for yourself with our Bolsius True Joy Vanilla Delight scented bouquet and enjoy the sweet combination of vanilla and a hint of ylang ylang and jasmine, on a base of amber and musk; this scented bouquet guarantees the purest fragrance diffusion for up to 8 weeks, thanks to our ScentFusion technology

Vanilla Delight spreads a warm, flowery scent that relaxes you and makes you feel comfortable; enjoy the sweet combination of vanilla and a hint of ylang ylang and jasmine, on a base of amber and musk
The composition was made from natural extracts; the subtle fragrance gradually spreads throughout the room and persists for up to 8 weeks; enjoy a pure and intense olfactory experience in your home

Be enchanted by True Joy's rich scents, capturing the beauty of nature through vibrant colors, captivating shapes and alluring fragrances; treat yourself to a unique blend of our fragrances, elegantly presented - a perfect gift for everyone; designed with ScentFusion technology, we guarantee the purest fragrance and the release of the cleanest fragrance

Since 1870, we have been inspiring magical moments with our products; thanks to our passion for candles and fragrances and our attention to quality, we guarantee you a perfect flame and a fantastic olfactory experience
